note: This backlog follows the refined PRD beta track. It is execution guidance, not product truth by itself.

milestones.goal: Lock the beta-track product boundaries and entry strategy.
deliverables: Pi as direct orchestrator backup entry
Snap as lightweight direct-action backup entry

milestones.goal: Redesign the three core workflow commands and main TUI interaction.
deliverables: Coherent Mic / Pi / Snap interaction family

milestones.goal: Harden rematch and model-match for beta use.
Add product QA and run a beta pilot.
deliverables: Dispatch / resume / rematch / fallback acceptance coverage
Recorded local pilot defects and gaps

milestones.goal: Ship an honest npm beta plugin.
deliverables: Real git baseline and beta release discipline
Aligned README / PRD / schema config / package story
Documented supporting plugin capabilities and beta-preserved expectations
Beta release boundaries and known limitations

milestones.goal: Converge the beta into a stable public plugin release.
deliverables: Tighter and lower-noise public product surface
